content: Something Won't Let You Leave... And it's something horrifying. Verity's voice actor: ‪@JustWhispy Special thanks to @GroxMC for accepting to be in the vid! Watch my videos on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/033vHZW7F2GVDiC44bHwfj Shoutout to: @itsfilsfr - Verity helpline voice actor @peaktownmc - made the laboratory machine model @9meoww - helped me with animations @HeroHayden47 - helped Whispy with voicelines This is part 3 of the Minecraft Verity Series: I built a way out, and it let me believe it. Every wire led to an escape. Every calculation said it would work. And the second it mattered, I found out it only ever worked one way. NO, you CANNOT publish mods, sell merch, or do anything commercial about Verity before asking me first. NO, you CANNOT repost dubbed versions of my videos. If you dubbed them, email me and I might add it as an official audio track. Intro - 0:00 - 0:28 Video - 0:28 - 24:39 Outro - 24:39 - 24:48 This video is a horror short film, it uses scripted editing and sounds to add the main entity in video. THERE IS NO MOD. #minecraft #minecrafthorror #horror #minecraftarg
chineseContent: 有些东西不会让你离开……而且这很可怕。 Verity 的配音演员：@JustWhispy 特别感谢@GroxMC 接受出现在视频中！在 Spotify 上观看我的视频：https://open.spotify.com/show/033vHZW7F2GVDiC44bHwfj 致谢：@itsfilsfr - Verity 热线配音演员 @peaktownmc - 制作了实验室机器模型 @9meoww - 帮助我制作动画 @HeroHayden47 - 帮助 Whispy 制作语音 这是 Minecraft Verity 系列的第 3 部分：我开辟了一条出路，它让我相信。每根电线都通向逃生通道。每一次计算都表明它会起作用。当事情变得重要的时候，我发现它只能以一种方式起作用。不，在先询问我之前，您不能发布模组、销售商品或进行任何有关 Verity 的商业活动。不，您不能重新发布我的视频的配音版本。如果您为它们配音，请给我发电子邮件，我可能会将其添加为官方音轨。简介 - 0:00 - 0:28 视频 - 0:28 - 24:39 结尾 - 24:39 - 24:48 该视频是一部恐怖短片，它使用脚本编辑和声音来添加视频中的主要实体。没有模组。 #minecraft #minecrafthorror #恐怖 #minecraftarg
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
